title: Loop rehearsal — stale draft hygiene and actionable improvement draft drill
problem: After ticket-049, fixture MVP runs produce zero actionable improvement drafts by design, while improvement_ticket_latest.json still held a stale rejected missing_quote_span draft. The self-improvement loop positive path (fresh actionable draft → review → promotion decision) had not been exercised post-filter; overgeneralized_scope was the next golden-covered false-positive class.
acceptance_criteria: Pre-ticket audit rejects overgeneralized_scope promotion as golden-covered duplicate (GT02).
overgeneralized_scope filtered from improvement drafts; weak_concept_mapping still generates actionable drafts.
Stale improvement_ticket_latest.json superseded with empty list artifact.
GT20/GT21 and operator loop tests pass; python -m rge.cli verify --skip-site passes.
non_goals: Do not promote any draft with --confirm in this ticket.
Do not weaken claim_validator rejection rules.
Do not change public export schema.
rollback_plan: Revert ticket-053 branch; restore prior improvement artifact and ticket_writer filter set.
